titleStmt.title: SII 15.48: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 48. (B.K. No. 54 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam of the Kāśīviśvanātha temple.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of Chālukya-Vikrama Chakravarti Tribhuvanamalla, Prajāpati, Pushya-amāvāsyā, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa.

The inscription may refer to the reign of Vikramāditya VI, but his 3rd regnal year did not fall in Prajāpati. The 3rd regnal year Prajāpati, however fits in for the reign of Taila III. In that case, we have to assume that Tribhuvanamalla was another title of Taila III. It is also possible to surmise that this Tribhuvanamalla was Sōmēśvara IV and that he was associated with his father Taila III in the administration of the kingdom from the beginning. Pushya-amāvāsyā in Prajāpati would thus correspond to 1152 A.D., January 8, which was Tuesday. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa did not occur on this tithi, but on the Pāurṇimā day of that month.

The epigraph registers a gift of gold made by Perggaḍeyara Tribhuvanakēśava described as the ‘dear son’ of the Thousand Mahājanas of Lokkiguṇḍi for the offerings to the god Kavatāḷēśvara. The gift was entrusted to Sōmēśvara-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. A gift of land for the offerings to the same god made by Sōviseṭṭi is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© [śrī Ōṁ] namaḥ sivāya © namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
ma saṁstāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīra¨rccatu¨rvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśadha¨rmmaśāstrakuśa ḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhai¨ryya¨rddhai¨ryyaparākramarāśritajanakalpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣayakara¨rkkali yugagāṁgēya¨rpparamaparōpakārigaḷāhavadhuraṁdhara¨rssāpānugrahasama¨rttha¨rkkā¨ryya brahaspatigaḷēkaikapaṁḍita¨rgrāmanāmōttama¨rvvē�ṣṇavagītimanōhara¨rppāpabhīrugaḷpa ranārīdūra¨rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka¨rvviśiṣṭajanāśraya¨rkkāmakrōdhalōbhamō
haviva¨rjita¨rdvātriṁśatsahasrasama�¨rghyaruha¨rdvijakuḷatiḷaka¨rśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararu samastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrirāmaradattimahāgrāmaṁ śrīmallokkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pramukha mahājanaṁ śrī sāsi¨rvvaruṁ samastagōlegōbrāhmaṇa¨rmmodalāgi sabāla vṛddha¨rnneredu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ surakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire . Intu nega¨rtte vetta śrī sāsi¨rvvara priyaputraṁ pe¨rggaḍeyara kēśavadēvana vaṁśāvatāramenteṁdaḍe .
Odavida kī¨rtti raṁjisuvinaṁ vinayaṁbudhi bācirājani¨rddude sabhe dhāriṇītaḷamanujvaḷa māgire mā¨rppa bhānuvi¨rdduda gagavaṁ viḷāsapatiyiṁ naḍe pāḍuva rājahaṁsayi¨rdude koḷanopputi¨rppa surabhūruhavi¨rddude divyanaṁdana . Ā vibhuvina sati sītādēvigaruṁ dhatige satyabhāvege doreyeṁbī vinidhaguṇadinasedaḷu bhāvisuvaḍe mākikavve vanitāratna . Ā daṁpatigaḷa cittakkādaṁ santōṣamāge janiyisidaṁ saṁpāditapuṇyaṁ śubhamuditōdita mene kēsirāja
neṁbaṁ putraṁ . nuḍi todaḷā¨rppu nippasaravāyamaduḷvasivikramakramaṁ baḍavara māri peṁpu mugiloḍḍaṟuta kuṟugaṁ� ṁṭu halkaḍivinayaṁ prapaṁca puruṣā¨rtthamana¨rtthaka meṁba nāḍa niggaḍigaḷanentu pōlipemo kēśavadēvanoḷanya ma¨rttyara . sa¨rvvātmanā parā ¨rtthakkō¨rvvane tiḷakaṁboli¨rddanadintu kaḷāsa¨rvvajña¨rppogaḷva¨rssāsi¨rvvara putraṁ vivēkanidhi kēśavanaṁ . Intu poga¨rttegaṁ nega¨rttegaṁ neleyāda pe¨rggaḍeyara śrī tribhuvana kēśavadēvaṁ tanna
¨rccina kēṇiyadhikāradelu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla dēva variṣada 3 neya prajāpati saṁvatsarada puṣyadamāvāsya Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatī pātadandu grāmādhideyvaṁ śrīkavatāḷēśvaradācā¨ryyaru svasti yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhi ṣaḍaṁgōpahārādi saṁpannaranēka ta¨rkkādiśāstrapārāvārapāragaramaḷakī¨rttidhvajaramaḷinacaritra
¨rbhāratīka¨rṇnapūrarappa śrīmatsōmēśvarapaṁḍitara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ geydu dēva¨rgge prabhā tada tuyyalanivēdyakkācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavaṁntāgi variṣaṁ prati nūṟa yippattu gadyāṇahonna cinnada vaṭṭa mūṟu honnaṁ biṭṭaridanāro¨rvvarakkasālada kēṇiyaṁ koṇḍa kēṇikāṟaruṁ śrīsāsi¨rvvaruṁ tamma dha¨rmmamāgi pratipāḷisuvaru . Ī dha¨rmmamaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ rakṣisidava¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrava¨rgghyatī¨rtthaṁ prayāgeyeṁba puṇya tī¨rtthaṁ
gaḷūḷu sāsira kavileya kōḍukoḷagumaṁ suva¨rṇnakhacitamāḍi sāsi¨rvva¨rvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇa¨rgge koṭṭa puṇyamakkumidaṁ kiḍisidava¨rgganitu kavileyumananiba ¨rbrāhmaṇarumanā puṇyatī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷu koṁda mahāpātakanakku . śrīmatu gaṁdhiga dāsiseṭṭiya maga sōviseṭṭi rāvegallatevaragammoḷala dāriyiṁ mūḍaṇa kamalanāyakara baḷadoḷage dēva¨rgge rātriya pālmaṁḍageya nivēdyakkeṁdu biṭṭa mattaru mūṟu . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
